Enum.value: Imperial for Civil Eng (ft, lb, mph)

Property.name: angular_backlash
Property.doc: The angle by which this gear can turn without moving the mating gear.

Property.name: axle_holesize
Property.doc: diameter of central hole for axle

Property.name: backlash
Property.doc: The arc length on the pitch circle by which the tooth thickness is reduced.

Property.name: head
Property.doc: head_value * module_value = additional length of head

Property.name: head_fillet
Property.doc: a fillet for the tooth-head, radius = head_fillet x module

Property.name: module
Property.doc: normal module if properties_from_tool=True, else it's the transverse module.

Property.name: properties_from_tool
Property.doc: if helix_angle is given and properties_from_tool is enabled, gear parameters are internally recomputed for the rotated gear

Property.name: root_fillet
Property.doc: a fillet for the tooth-root, radius = root_fillet x module

Property.name: traverse_module
Property.doc: traverse module of the generated gear

Property.name: angular_backlash
Property.doc: The angle by which this gear can turn without moving the mating gear.

Property.name: axle_holesize
Property.doc: diameter of central hole for axle

Property.name: backlash
Property.doc: The arc length on the pitch circle by which the tooth thickness is reduced.

Property.name: head
Property.doc: head_value * module_value = additional length of head

Property.name: head_fillet
Property.doc: a fillet for the tooth-head, radius = head_fillet x module

Property.name: module
Property.doc: normal module if properties_from_tool=True, else it's the transverse module.

Property.name: properties_from_tool
Property.doc: if helix_angle is given and properties_from_tool is enabled, gear parameters are internally recomputed for the rotated gear

Property.name: root_fillet
Property.doc: a fillet for the tooth-root, radius = root_fillet x module

Property.name: traverse_module
Property.doc: traverse module of the generated gear

Property.doc: The angle by which this gear can turn without moving the mating gear.

Property.doc: diameter of central hole for axle

Property.doc: a fillet for the tooth-head, radius = head_fillet x module

Property.name: module
Property.doc: normal module if properties_from_tool=True, else it's the transverse module.

Property.name: properties_from_tool
Property.doc: if helix_angle is given and properties_from_tool is enabled, gear parameters are internally recomputed for the rotated gear

Property.name: root_fillet
Property.doc: a fillet for the tooth-root, radius = root_fillet x module

Property.name: traverse_module
Property.doc: traverse module of the generated gear

Property.name: angular_backlash
Property.doc: The angle by which this gear can turn without moving the mating gear.

Property.name: axle_holesize
Property.doc: diameter of central hole for axle

Property.name: backlash
Property.doc: The arc length on the pitch circle by which the tooth thickness is reduced.

Property.name: head
Property.doc: head_value * module_value = additional length of head

Property.name: head_fillet
Property.doc: a fillet for the tooth-head, radius = head_fillet x module

Property.name: module
Property.doc: normal module if properties_from_tool=True, else it's the transverse module.

Property.name: properties_from_tool
Property.doc: if helix_angle is given and properties_from_tool is enabled, gear parameters are internally recomputed for the rotated gear

Property.name: root_fillet
Property.doc: a fillet for the tooth-root, radius = root_fillet x module

Property.name: traverse_module
Property.doc: traverse module of the generated gear

Property.name: angle1
Property.doc: angle at which second gear is placed

Property.name: angle2
Property.doc: angle at which second gear is placed

Property.name: master_gear_stationary
Property.doc: master gear position is fixed (does not orbit)

Property.name: slave_gear_stationary
Property.doc: slave gear position is fixed (does not orbit)

Property.name: angular_backlash
Property.doc: The angle by which this gear can turn without moving the mating gear.

Property.name: axle_holesize
Property.doc: diameter of central hole for axle

Property.name: backlash
Property.doc: The arc length on the pitch circle by which the tooth thickness is reduced.

Property.name: head
Property.doc: head_value * module_value = additional length of head

Property.name: head_fillet
Property.doc: a fillet for the tooth-head, radius = head_fillet x module

Property.name: module
Property.doc: normal module if properties_from_tool=True, else it's the transverse module.

Property.name: properties_from_tool
Property.doc: if helix_angle is given and properties_from_tool is enabled, gear parameters are internally recomputed for the rotated gear

Property.name: root_fillet
Property.doc: a fillet for the tooth-root, radius = root_fillet x module

Property.name: traverse_module
Property.doc: traverse module of the generated gear

String.value: p BEARING, SINGLE-ROW RADIAL, DOUBLE-SEALED, METRIC 6000-2RS SERIES \X2\2014\X0\ 6001-2RS \X2\2014\X0\ 12mm ID \X2\00d7\X0\ 28mm OD \X2\00d7\X0\ 8mm W
